hero_sub: Reliable plastering for homes and businesses in Carlisle. Call now

services.title: Internal Plastering
services.body: Smooth walls and ceilings with high-quality skim or multi-finish plaster

services.title: External Rendering
services.body: Durable sand and cement render for brick or blockwork facades

services.title: Dry Lining
services.body: Dot and dab plasterboard for faster, cleaner internal walls

about: Cjm Plastering handles plastering jobs in Carlisle with no-nonsense efficiency. Contact via phone or email for straightforward quotes

faq.q: What area does Cjm Plastering cover?
faq.a: Cjm Plastering operates in Carlisle and the surrounding local area

faq.q: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a: You can book by calling 07794 207677 or emailing cjmplastering1@outlook.com

faq.q: What should I expect during the plastering process?
faq.a: The team will prepare the surfaces, apply plaster, and finish to a smooth standard. You’ll need to clear the area beforehand and allow drying time after
